calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-08-291741 The Rosenfeld Family Trust and PTR-08-291742 The Rosenfeld Marital Trust.

Appearances: Margaret Martin for and with Claudia Johnson (Trustee).

Ms. Martin explained services provided by Ms. Johnson, the state the Trusts were in when Ms. Johnson took over, family dynamics, how Ms. Johnson is managing the properties, that the agreement made with the family members was to have the Trusts under Court supervision for a three year period and requested that the accounting petitions in both matters be taken off calendar. Both accounting petitions were taken off calendar at Counsel's request.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
